seoDescription: EnVision Beauty — non-invasive body sculpting and post-op recovery care in downtown Santa Rosa with Diana. Ultrasonic cavitation, laser lipo, RF skin tightening, wood therapy.
heroSubheading: Non-invasive body sculpting and post-op recovery care in downtown Santa Rosa with Diana.
aboutBody: EnVision Beauty is a body-sculpting studio in downtown Santa Rosa, run by Diana. The focus is non-invasive fat reduction, skin tightening, and post-operative recovery support, so clients can reach their goals without surgery or downtime.

Clients describe Diana as personable and dedicated, taking time to explain each treatment and make people comfortable before getting started. Every visit begins with a consultation to assess the area and answer questions before booking.

services.title: Ultrasonic Cavitation
services.description: Non-invasive treatment that targets stubborn fat for a slimmer, more contoured look.

services.title: Laser Lipo
services.description: Non-surgical fat reduction to help define and shape targeted areas of the body.

services.title: Radio Frequency Skin Tightening
services.description: RF and vacuum treatments that smooth, firm, and contour the skin.

services.title: Post-Op Care
services.description: Supportive recovery care for clients after procedures such as liposuction and BBL.

services.title: Wood Therapy
services.description: A manual sculpting technique that helps reduce the appearance of cellulite and contour the body.

testimonials.quote: Diana is very personable, cares very much about her clients, and is dedicated to providing quality results.
testimonials.author: Julia Hill

testimonials.quote: Diana was knowledgeable and made me comfortable. I was surprised how well it worked and feel more confident.
testimonials.author: Maribel C.

notes: EnVision Beauty LLC (body sculpting, owner "Diana") — NOT the separate "Envision Beauty Studio" (permanent makeup). Confirm Diana’s last name + licensing. Tiny review counts → rating omitted. Phone (707) 490-7277, 884 3rd St Ste E. Hours conflict — confirm. No first-party photos.
